'''Klaymor 4-2''' was the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] where an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] reconnaissance mission discovered a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] spy probe. A single [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] was dispatched to destroy the probe.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1stm}}
